tool.name: Build trackDb
tool.description: generate a per-assembly UCSC trackDb.txt for the BRC pangenome hub
tool.command: python '$__tool_directory__/build_trackdb.py' --assembly '$assembly' --strain '$strain' #if str($strain_label).strip() != '' --strain-label #for $tok in str($strain_label).split() '$tok' #end for #end if #if str($anchor).strip() != '' --anchor #for $tok in str($anchor).split() '$tok' #end for #end if #if str($maf).strip() != '' --maf '$maf' #end if --chains-dir '$chains_dir' --group '$group' #if $is_reference --is-reference #end if --output '$trackdb'

param.label: Assembly accession (this genome)
param.help: Accession of the genome this trackDb is for, e.g. GCA_000002415.2.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, dot, hyphen only

param.label: Strain name (this genome)
param.help: Strain label for this genome, e.g. Sal-I.

validator.message: Letters, digits, space, underscore, dot, hyphen only

param.label: Panel members (ACC=LABEL ...)
param.help: Space-separated ACC=LABEL pairs for every assembly in the panel. Drives speciesOrder/speciesLabels of the bigMaf and the chain sub-tracks (one per other assembly). A bare ACC uses itself as the label.

validator.message: Tokens like ACC or ACC=LABEL, space separated

param.label: Anchor strains (ACC=LABEL ...)
param.help: Space-separated ACC=LABEL pairs for the anchor strains that contribute gene projections (annotation sub-tracks).

validator.message: Tokens like ACC or ACC=LABEL, space separated

param.label: bigMaf bigDataUrl (optional)
param.help: bigDataUrl for the standalone bigMaf track. Defaults to {strain}.multiz.maf.bb.

param.label: Chains sub-directory
param.help: Directory (relative to the assembly dir) holding the bigChain .bb pairs.

param.label: This is the reference assembly
param.help: When set, also emit the reference-only selection/orthogroup composite (3 sub-tracks).

tool.help:
**Build trackDb**
Generates a per-assembly UCSC track-hub ``trackDb.txt`` for the BRC pangenome hub (pipeline phase K.5). For a given assembly it emits, **in this order**:
1. ``track {strain}_multiz`` - a **standalone** ``type bigMaf`` track (the multi-way MAF alignment, with ``speciesOrder`` / ``speciesLabels``). 2. ``track brc_pangenome_chains`` - a **composite** of ``type bigChain`` sub-tracks, one per *other* assembly in the panel, each with a ``bigDataUrl`` + ``linkDataUrl`` pointing at the ``bigChain.bb`` / ``bigChain.link.bb`` pair. 3. ``track brc_pangenome_annot`` - a **composite** of ``type bigBed 12`` sub-tracks, one per anchor strain's gene projection. 4. ``track brc_pangenome_select`` - emitted **only for the reference assembly**; a ``type bigBed 12`` composite with the selection (strict / relaxed) and orthogroup-membership BigBed tracks.
> **Why two separate composites?** A UCSC composite requires all members to > share a single ``type``. ``bigMaf`` and ``bigChain`` are different types, so > they **cannot** live in one composite - the bigMaf is standalone and the > chains sit in their own ``bigChain`` composite.
-----
**Key inputs**
- *Assembly accession* / *Strain* - identity of this genome. - *Panel members* - ``ACC=LABEL`` for every assembly; sets the bigMaf species ordering/labels and the per-target chain sub-tracks. - *Anchor strains* - ``ACC=LABEL`` for the strains contributing gene projections (the annotation sub-tracks). - *This is the reference assembly* - adds the selection/orthogroup composite.
**Output**
- ``trackDb.txt`` - the assembled track-hub stanza file.
